brief_notes: Well-executed molecular biology paper identifying Ema2 as a SUMO E3 ligase promoting lncRNA transcription for DNA elimination in Tetrahymena. Logical progression from expression/localization through functional analysis to mechanism. Multiple orthogonal experimental approaches (FISH, northern blots, small RNA-seq, mass spec, cell fractionation) strengthen claims. The surprising finding that Spt6 SUMOylation is dispensable for lncRNA transcription (C-KR mutant) adds nuance and honesty. Detailed Materials and Methods. Strong citations placing work in evolutionary context. Minor: some figure references lack actual figures in the tex.
